name: seven-pyramid-deploy-workspace
description: Lightweight workspace for the canonical Seven Pyramid deploy bundle
author: Seven Pyramid Wine Import Business

scripts.check:deploy: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['deploy/.htaccess','deploy/index.html','deploy/404.html','deploy/wine_list.html','deploy/css/style.css','deploy/js/app.js','deploy/img/7pyramidlogo.webp','deploy/countries/france.html','deploy/regions/france-bordeaux.html','deploy/wines/md001-20-g1-ch-lafite-rothschild-2020.html','deploy/robots.txt','deploy/sitemap.xml','deploy/site.webmanifest']; const missing=required.filter((file)=>!fs.existsSync(file)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing deploy files:\n' + missing.join('\n')); process.exit(1);} console.log('deploy/ is present and internally complete.');"
